/usr/bin/gfortran -Wl,-z,noexecstack -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/test_lag.dir/link.d -fallow-argument-mismatch -ffree-line-length-none -fallow-argument-mismatch -fopenmp -O2 -Werror=trampolines -Werror=line-truncation -Wconversion CMakeFiles/test_lag.dir/test_lag.F90.o -o test_lag
